changes: pointed vector paths to local assets/vectors and projects/data
added smoke_samples argument for tiny adapter/training checks
added CPU device parsing plus batch_size and num_workers arguments
dependency_fix: installed prettytable in flat37 so FastNLP imports

verification.py_compile: passed for main.py, utils/load_data.py, and utils/paths.py

cpu_smoke.command: conda run -n flat37 python main.py --dataset redjujube --seed 42 --n_epochs 1 --device cpu --batch_size 4 --num_workers 0 --smoke_samples 16
cpu_smoke.scope: adapter/data/lexicon/model/trainer chain only; not a paper metric

next_full_command: conda run -n flat37 python main.py --dataset redjujube --seed 42 --n_epochs 100 --device 0 --batch_size 16 --num_workers 2
blocker: full training deferred because GPU still has another resident Python process after BERT-MRC+DSC completed
